tool_args.label: IT Consulting Contract Term Start and End

payload.description: Ten-year contract term for IT consulting retainer contract
RFP was advertised and issued to 265 firms for IT consulting services
Original contract term for Transportation Planning and Conceptual Design Retainer
Extended contract term for 11 Transportation Planning contracts (12 months)

payload.claim_text: The contracts resulting from this procurement are currently being evaluated to determine the necessity and appropriate scope, if any, of cybersecurity requirements, including any requirements under federal, state, and local law and regulations.
payload.subject: IT Consulting contract cybersecurity requirements

payload.claim_text: Staffing requirements estimated at up to $1.5 million will only be solicited from the pool of 26 MWBE and SDVOB firms. Staffing requirements exceeding $1.5 million will follow 15 percent MBE, 15 percent WBE, and 6 percent SDVOB goals.
payload.subject: MWBE/SDVOB goals for IT consulting staffing

payload.claim_text: This contract will be funded by Agency Operating Budgets.
payload.subject: IT Consulting contract funding

payload.claim_text: The contract's extension and additional funding are necessary to address and support critical initiatives including: (1) environmental assessment and impact studies, (2) advancement of promising expansion projects from the 2025-29 Capital Program, and (3) rail network strategy studies.
payload.subject: Transportation Planning retainer purpose

payload.claim_text: Examples of projects planned in the next year include 125th Street Subway conceptual designs, Hudson line to Penn Station study, Jamaica station planning, Communications-Based Train Control and bottlenecks study, a regional rail network study, and a sampling efficiency study.
payload.subject: Planned projects under Transportation Planning retainer
